name: DynaVap - The Vong (i) Titanium
summary: A compact all-titanium DynaVap designed to fit 10-14mm water pieces, for patients who want flame-powered vapour through glass.
description: The VonG (i) Titanium is the smaller member of the DynaVap family, built to slot into 10-14mm female water pipes, bubblers and bongs as well as running dry. Heated with a butane torch (sold separately), it produces clean, flavourful vapour with no battery to charge or replace. Titanium construction makes it durable, repairable and light enough to carry anywhere. A good fit for patients who already own a water piece and want a battery-free device to pair with it.
